allow: Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\(''TESTING/integrity_check.ipynb''\)\); [print\(f''{i}: id={c.get\(""id"",""?""\)} type={c[""cell_type""]} src={c[""source""][0][:80] if c[""source""] else ""\(empty\)""}''\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb[''cells'']\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\(''TESTING/integrity_check.ipynb'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); [print\(f''{i}: id={c.get\(""id"",""?""\)} type={c[""cell_type""]} src={\("""".join\(c[""source""]\)\)[:80]}''\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb[''cells'']\)]")
